title: A2UI Renderer Capabilities Schema
description: A schema for the a2uiRendererCapabilities object, which is sent from the renderer to the agent as part of the A2A metadata to describe the renderer's UI rendering capabilities.

v1.0.description: The capabilities structure for version 1.0 of the A2UI protocol.

supportedCatalogIds.description: An array of string identifiers for each of the component and function catalogs supported by the renderer.

inlineCatalogs.description: An array of inline catalog definitions, which can contain both components and functions. This should only be provided if the agent declares 'acceptsInlineCatalogs: true' in its capabilities.
